footer.description: Systems engineering, automation and infrastructure for high-demand operations.

home.metaDescription: Systems engineering, operational automation, applied AI and cloud infrastructure for high-demand operations.
home.headline: Systems engineering for operations that demand control
home.body: We design platforms, automations and infrastructure for companies operating with high demands. Backend, cloud, intelligent agents and integrations built for reliability and predictable scale.

about.metaTitle: About RBX Systems — AI Engineering, LLMOps & Infrastructure
about.metaDescription: Meet RBX Systems: applied AI engineering, sovereign platforms, operational automation and products for logistics, finance and critical operations.
about.headline: RBX Systems builds operational platforms with AI
about.body: We are a systems engineering company focused on high-demand operations. We build infrastructure, intelligent agents and enterprise software with governance, observability and predictable scale.

team.metaDescription: Meet the founding team of RBX Systems. Systems engineering, applied AI and technical leadership for high-demand operations.
team.headline: Team
team.body: RBX Systems is built by engineers and systems operators. Meet the founders and technical leadership behind the platform.

leandroDamasio.metaTitle: Leandro Damasio — Founder & CEO of RBX Systems
leandroDamasio.metaDescription: Leandro Damasio is an AI Engineer, founder of RBX Systems and creator of products such as Strategos, Robson and the RBX sovereign AI platform.
leandroDamasio.headline: Leandro Damasio
leandroDamasio.body: AI Engineer, Platform & Backend Systems, Technical Leadership. Founder & CEO of RBX Systems.

solutions.metaTitle: RBX Systems Solutions — AI Engineering, LLMOps, Agents & Cloud
solutions.metaDescription: AI engineering, LLMOps, intelligent agents, DevOps, cloud, financial software and logistics software services. Built for critical operations.
solutions.headline: Solutions
solutions.body: Engineering capabilities for operations that demand control, governance and predictable scale.

products.metaTitle: RBX Systems Products — Strategos, Ledger, Yield, Maestro & Robson
products.metaDescription: Products and open-source software by RBX Systems: Strategos, RBX Ledger, RBX Yield, RBX Maestro, Robson and Argos Radar. Systems for decisions, finance and operations.
products.headline: Products
products.body: Products and open-source systems built by RBX for high-demand operations.

journal.metaDescription: Ideas, engineering and field notes from RBX Systems. Technical articles on AI, LLMOps, agents, software and infrastructure.

journal.body: Ideas, engineering and field notes from RBX Systems.

partnership.headline: Engineering partnership for complex software
partnership.body: RBX is the engineering partner for founders whose product outgrew generalist approaches. Diagnosis, modernization, platform, governed AI, and continued operation.

diagnostic.headline: Technical Product Review
diagnostic.body: An independent technical diagnosis of your product. Fixed scope. One to two weeks. Read-only. The starting point.

robson.headline: Robson · execution and risk engine
robson.body: Deterministic execution and risk management for leveraged crypto markets. Not an autotrader. Not a signal.

briefing.headline: Daily BTC Briefing
briefing.body: Daily operational reading of BTC futures. By 07h00 every business day. Not signals. Not advice.
